evals.expected_output: defuddle extracts the article to clean markdown saved at raw/{date}-{slug}.md; control returns to the orchestrator for content-type routing.

evals.prompt: Summarize this URL into the wiki — long blog post.
evals.expected_output: Same flow — defuddle extracts; orchestrator decides content-type and where the synthesized page lands.

evals.prompt: This site is JS-heavy and bot-blocked: <URL>
evals.expected_output: Falls back from defuddle to pure.md; cleaned markdown saved at raw/{date}-{slug}.md.
